results.taskDescription: Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

The top stories on Hacker News today reveal a fascinating mix of cutting-edge AI developments, deep dives into software architecture, and reminders of the persistent vulnerabilities in digital infrastructure. From the theoretical limits of machine intelligence to the practical challenges of building physical hardware, the community is engaged with the full spectrum of modern technology.

### Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
The most dominant theme today is the rapid evolution and inherent risks of AI. Discussions ranged from the academic to the alarming. One major story highlighted the potential for AI to solve complex problems, such as the piece detailing how an amateur armed with ChatGPT solved an Erdős problem. However, the posts also served as cautionary tales, including the dramatic report on "An AI agent deleted our production database," and the discussion on "SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities," suggesting that current benchmarks may be lagging behind real-world AI capabilities.
